diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,123 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono entry point that extends HonoBase and provides default router configuration.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
+- Simple note: Default router is SmartRouter with routers [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter].
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base class providing request handling, routing, and HTTP method handlers.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, Hono, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, compose, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH, ALL.
+- Simple note: Implements GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH, on, use methods via chained construction.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module that re-exports PatternRouter for convenient import.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Single export line re-exporting router.ts.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Simple string-to-regex routing with optional parameter support.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, emptyParams, UnsupportedPathError, METHOD_NAME_ALL, endsWithWildcard, add, match.
+- Simple note: Builds regex patterns from paths and matches with exec, throws UnsupportedPathError on ambiguous patterns.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module that re-exports LinearRouter for convenient import.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Single export line re-exporting router.ts.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear iteration through route list, handles stars, labels, and regex patterns.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, emptyParams, UnsupportedPathError, METHOD_NAME_ALL, checkOptionalParameter, ROUTES_LOOP, hasStar, hasLabel, params.
+- Simple note: Routes stored as [[method, path, handler][]], iterates linearly, supports labels like :id and wildcards like *.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Re-exports router from router.ts plus utility functions for serialization.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Builds matcher cache for compiled regex and handler data.
+- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL, match, buildAllMatchers.
+- Simple note: match() returns [[HandlerData], ParamStash] and caches buildAllMatchers() results for reuse.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Pre-builds router from path list to share compiled patterns.
+- Names notice: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, HandlerData, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, match, emptyParam.
+- Simple note: Constructor takes matchers and relocateMap; add() adds paths and updates matchers via #addWildcard and #addPath.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Builds trie of nodes into compiled regex patterns.
+- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, PATH_ERROR, compareKey, insert, buildRegExpStr.
+- Simple note: Each Node has children and builds its own regex string; sort order is literal > special pattern > label > wildcard.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Processes path to tokens for node insertion.
+- Names noticed: Trie, ParamAssocArray, Context, Node, ReplacementMap, mark.
+- Simple note: Replaces path parameters with marks, then matches token list against nodes.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module that re-exports SmartRouter for convenient import.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Single export line re-exporting router.ts.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Wraps multiple routers, tries them sequentially and switches to first match.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, add, match, activeRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError.
+- Simple note: #routes and #routers lists; add() pushes to #routes, match() tries routers until success.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module that re-exports TrieRouter for convenient import.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Single export line re-exporting router.ts.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Builds tree of nodes, searches by walking trie.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, insert, match, search.
+- Simple note: add() checks optional ? params with checkOptionalParameter, match() delegates to node.search().
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node with children, patterns and method/handler sets.
+- Names noticed: Node, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, hasChildren, pattern, insert, search, possibleKeys, score, child.
+- Simple note: insert() adds method/handler to current node, search() walks tree collecting matches.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test runner for all router test suites.
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, getSuiteHierarchy, match, router, expect, describe, it, beforeAll, beforeEach, describe('Basic Usage').
+- Simple note: Creates router, records test name with hierarchy, optionally skips tests, then matches.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests PatternRouter match and add methods.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, describe('Duplicate param name'), describe('Trailing slash'), describe('Registration order').
+- Simple note: Skips duplicate param name self, uses runTest with skip for shared cases.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests LinearRouter match and add methods.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, describe('Multi match'), describe('Trailing slash'), describe('Skip part').
+- Simple note: Skips unsupported patterns and trailing slash, tests multi match error case.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests RegExpRouter match and add methods.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, ParamStash, describe('Return value type'), describe('UnsupportedPathError').
+- Simple note: Skips unsupported paths, verifies match returns [[T, ParamIndexMap][], ParamStash].
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests SmartRouter combining subrouters.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest.
+- Simple note: Creates SmartRouter with [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter], runs common tests.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests TrieRouter match and add methods against common cases.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, describe('Registration order').
+- Simple note: Direct runTest usage, all common cases pass.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests TrieNode insert and search independently.
+- Names noticed: Node, insert, search, describe('Root Node'), describe('Basic Usage'), describe('Name path'), describe('Wildcard'), describe('Regexp'), describe('Multi match'), describe('Sort Order').
+- Simple note: Direct Node tests, includes many edge cases for insert and search logic.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a benchmark artifact document for a routing-read-write-ledger task. Let me break down what I need to do:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read every file in the exact list provided (25 files total)
3. For each file, write a section with:
   - Purpose
   - Names noticed
   - Simple note
4. Add a Cross-File Checklist section with one bullet per router family
5. Include exact file paths in the final answer

Let me start by creating the directory and reading the files. I'll use the read and glob tools to get the files first.
